spec_match.rationale: Natively and cleanly tests the new border-area clip composited over padding-box layer clips to prove multi-layered background support works perfectly.

interactive.rationale: Features a set of live selectors: border width, border radius, and gradient pickers.

edge_cases.rationale: Features elegant capability warnings and accurate comparative blocks.

design_system.rationale: Uses the correct theme CSS variables, high-contrast code boxes, and clean grid placements.

summary: A flawless interactive comparative demonstration illustrating multi-layer background clipping (border-area paired with padding-box) versus old pre-150 solid-color-mask stack patterns.
